calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. No objection was filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-30-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs are sanctioned $200.00 each, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (212)
